vocab.meaning: một làn gió mới (sự thay đổi mới mẻ, thú vị)
vocab.example: I find contemporary installations to be a breath of fresh air compared to the repetitive themes in classical galleries.
I lean towards traditional art because those masterpieces have truly stood the test of time for centuries.

vocab.word: beauty is in the eye of the beholder
vocab.ipa: /ˈbjuːti ɪz ɪn ðɪ aɪ əv ðə bɪˈhəʊldər/
vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp nằm trong mắt kẻ si tình (tùy cảm nhận mỗi người)
vocab.example: Whether you prefer abstract splashes or realistic portraits, beauty is in the eye of the beholder.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua những giới hạn/quy chuẩn thông thường
vocab.example: Modern art often pushes the boundaries of what we consider 'aesthetic', which I find incredibly intriguing.

vocab.meaning: mỗi người một sở thích/quan điểm
vocab.example: Some find modern art confusing, while others find traditional art boring; I guess it's each to their own.

vocab.meaning: vấn đề về thị hiếu/sở thích cá nhân
vocab.example: Choosing between the two styles is ultimately a matter of taste rather than a question of quality.

vocab.meaning: không phải sở thích của tôi
vocab.example: Abstract expressionism is not really my cup of tea; I much prefer the clear narratives of traditional paintings.
The social commentary in modern art pieces often provides plenty of food for thought.

vocab.meaning: mô tả/khắc họa một cách sống động
vocab.example: Traditional realism has the power to paint a vivid picture of historical events that words simply cannot.

vocab.meaning: hiện đại bậc nhất (thường dùng cho công nghệ trong nghệ thuật)
vocab.example: I am fascinated by modern digital art that utilizes state-of-the-art software to create immersive experiences.
